title: Micro-meteorite impact on Hull Section C
description: A micro-meteorite struck the outer hull of Section C at 0347 hours. Sensors detected a minor pressure drop in the adjacent corridor. Emergency sealant was deployed automatically. Structural integrity at 94%. Full inspection required.

title: Airlock pressure anomaly - Bay 7
description: Airlock cycling system in Bay 7 reported intermittent pressure fluctuations during routine cargo transfer. Pressure oscillated between 98.2 and 101.7 kPa over a 12-minute window. No personnel were at risk but EVA operations from Bay 7 have been suspended.

title: Coolant leak in Engineering Deck
description: A hairline fracture in coolant conduit ENG-C47 caused a slow leak of cryogenic coolant. Approximately 3.2 liters lost before automated shutoff engaged. Temperature in the reactor cooling loop rose 2.1°C above nominal. Repair crew dispatched.

title: Unauthorized access attempt - Research Lab Omega
description: Biometric access logs show three failed entry attempts to Research Lab Omega between 0200-0215 hours using a revoked credential badge (ID: NF-7742). Lab contains hazardous xenobiological samples. Security footage under review. Lab placed on lockdown.

title: Fire suppression false alarm - Hydroponics Bay
description: Smoke detectors triggered fire suppression system due to elevated humidity and particulate matter from nutrient misting cycle. No actual fire detected. Sensor calibration adjusted to account for agricultural operations.
resolution: Smoke detector sensitivity recalibrated for Hydroponics Bay environmental parameters. Firmware update applied to all Section 4 sensors.

title: Gravity generator fluctuation - Crew Quarters Alpha
description: Artificial gravity in Crew Quarters Alpha experienced brief fluctuations between 0.85g and 1.12g over a 45-second period at 2230 hours. Three crew members reported mild disorientation. Gravity stabilizers running diagnostic cycle.
